arts.ttl: Championship boss delivers transfer verdict amid Derby County links
arts.sum: Despite being benched for the first time this season during the match against Luton Town at the end of March, the Sheffield-born player returned to the starting line-up against Sheffield Wednesday last Saturday, which saw the Tigers secure a dramatic 94th-minute victory thanks to Charlie Hughes' powerful header, reports Hull Live . The former Sheffield United player is reportedly on the radar of Derby County and Stoke City, with the latter said to have been keen on him last summer.
